text: A street scene in a city, likely India, featuring a large wall covered in political posters and graffiti. The posters include images of political figures, one labeled 'सत्यमेव जयते' (Satyameva Jayate). The graffiti includes the text 'BEATE, CHHORO, JIYATE ALL' and 'NAGPUR'. Several people are riding motorcycles and scooters on the road in front of the wall, which is partially obscured by large trees.
label: Image
